blended.narrative: Loveland is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,972 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 7" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 2.6" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.6" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 34".
